endpoint.description: Elasticsearch cluster base URL (e.g. https://es.example.com:9200). Legacy also accepted base_url as an alias; this bundle standardizes on endpoint (see docs.md).

index.description: Index name to query for the 'documents' stream (required for that stream only).

api_key_id.description: Elasticsearch API key id. Paired with api_key_secret to build the 'Authorization: ApiKey base64(id:secret)' header (mode:custom AuthHook -- see docs.md). Takes precedence over username/password when both are configured, matching legacy's auth-selection order.

api_key_secret.description: Elasticsearch API key secret. See api_key_id.

username.description: Basic auth username, used when api_key_id/api_key_secret are not both set.

page_size.description: Documents per page for the 'documents' stream search (from/size pagination).

max_pages.description: Maximum pages to read for the 'documents' stream.

mode.description: Runtime mode: live (default) or fixture for credential-free conformance.
